claims.summary: Narrative arc compression should preserve opposed sentence turns instead of averaging them into a neutral flat state.
claims.rationale: Added `narrative_arc_curvature_preserves_opposed_sentence_oscillation`, which proves the existing read-only curvature sidecar keeps transition energy and sign turns visible without changing the 48D vector or gain.

claims.summary: Tail vibrancy at high entropy should remain distinguishable instead of being hard-clamped into lost nuance.
claims.rationale: Existing codec overflow and tail-vibrancy tests already distinguish raised tail headroom from ordinary hard clipping and preserve high-entropy tail differences under the bounded ceiling.

claims.summary: The codec should expose emotional/narrative velocity or acceleration before any future live gain response.
claims.rationale: `narrative_arc_dynamics_v1` and `codec_emotional_narrative_delta_check_v1` already report velocity/acceleration and emotional-vs-narrative deltas as read-only diagnostics with no semantic gain, reserved-dim, or live-vector write.
